text:
車のような形をしたダーカーがいる。
にわかには信じがたい話だが
かなりの目撃情報があるからね……

改めてヤツらの無軌道っぷりを
思い知らされるよ。

とは言え、相手がどんな姿であろうと
徹底的に叩き潰すだけだ。

あんたも手伝ってくれるだろう？
よ

There are Falspawn shaped like cars. It's
hard to fathom, but there have already been
numerous eyewitness reports.

Not to mention the fact that a number of
hapless folks have fallen victim to their
reckless driving.

Even so, no matter what form the
enemy takes, our job of destroying them
never changes.

I'm sure they'll be springing up again
before long. I'm counting on you when
the time comes.
